defs: The act of constructing, erecting, or establishing.
quotes: Hence it is that the building of our Sion rises no faster.

defs: The art of constructing edifices, or the practice of civil architecture.
quotes: The execution of works of architecture necessarily includes building; but building is frequently employed when the result is not architectural.

defs: That which is built; a fabric or edifice constructed, as a house, a church, etc.
quotes: Thy sumptuous buildings and thy wife's attire Have cost a mass of public treasury.
